name: JSF++: No Dead Code
description: Dead code — executable code or data not traceable to a system or software requirement — is not present.
rationale: JSF++: dead code is executable object code (or data) which, as a result of a design error, cannot be executed and is not traceable to a system or software requirement, and is prohibited.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
